rules.description: Macros may normalize strings, cast decimals and perform row-level money arithmetic, but must not own customer health segmentation or paid/refund business policy.
Compiled model SQL must not contain `{{`, `{%` or unresolved macro names.
Every macro argument in `normalization.sql` must be documented in `macros/properties.yml` with a type and description.
`mart_customer_revenue_health` must keep the revenue health `case` expression in model SQL for code review.
Compiled SQL must contain readable `lower`, `upper`, `cast(... decimal)`, quantity*price and amount*rate fragments.
